sourcesContent:
import React from "react"; import "./MarketPrices.css"; function MarketPrices() { const marketData = [ { crop: "Rice", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1536054999393-4f4b0f3b7f7e?w=600", market: "Hyderabad", price: "₹2300 / Quintal", trend: "📈 Rising", profitability: "High", description: "Rice demand is increasing due to seasonal exports and local consumption." }, { crop: "Cotton", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1597848212624-5b4eb0aaf645?w=600", market: "Warangal", price: "₹7200 / Quintal", trend: "📈 Rising", profitability: "Very High", description: "Cotton prices remain strong because of textile industry demand." }, { crop: "Tomato", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1592924357228-91a4daadcfea?w=600", market: "Nizamabad", price: "₹1800 / Quintal", trend: "📉 Falling", profitability: "Medium", description: "Tomato prices are slightly down due to oversupply in markets." }, { crop: "Maize", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551754655-cd27e38d2076?w=600", market: "Karimnagar", price: "₹2100 / Quintal", trend: "📈 Rising", profitability: "Good", description: "Maize demand is increasing from poultry and feed industries." } ]; return (

📈 Smart Farmer Market Dashboard

🌾 Crops

4

📈 Rising

3

📉 Falling

1

🏆 Top Crop

Cotton

{marketData.map((item, index) => (

{item.crop}

📍 Market: {" "} {item.market}

💰 Price: {" "} {item.price}

Trend: {" "} {item.trend}

⭐ Profitability: {" "} {item.profitability}

{item.description}

))}
); } export default MarketPrices;
